MULTIMADNESS-MALWARE.description:
Gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold]
Shuffle a copy of this card into an allies draw pile, it costs [blue]0[/blue]
MULTIMADNESS-MALWARE.title: Malware
MULTIMADNESS-TREACHERY.description: At the end of your turn, gain {AmountGiven} [gold]Strength[/gold] then deal {AllyDamage} damage to all ALLIES.
MULTIMADNESS-TREACHERY.title: Treachery
MULTIMADNESS-DISTRIBUTED_COMPUTING.title: Distributed Computing
MULTIMADNESS-COMPUTE.title: Compute
MULTIMADNESS-YOUVE_GOT_MAIL.title: You've Got Mail!
MULTIMADNESS-LUCIDITY.description: Whenever you take damage on your turn all allies gain {Multiplier:plural:that much|{Multiplier} times that much} block
MULTIMADNESS-LUCIDITY.title: Lucidity
MULTIMADNESS-BLIND_FURY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
 Deal {AllyDamage} to all allies.
MULTIMADNESS-BLIND_FURY.title: Blind Fury
MULTIMADNESS-PASS.description: Choose a card in your hand Exhaust it and give a copy to another player.
MULTIMADNESS-COMPETITION.description:
At the end of each turn 
if you dealt the least damage, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold]
 if you had the least block, gain 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold]
MULTIMADNESS-COMPETITION.title: Competition
MULTIMADNESS-PASS.title: Pass
